UNH.rationale: High-quality managed care compounder (24.6% ROE, strong YoY earnings growth) trading near the low end of its 1-year P/E range after a ~8% pullback, but lacking a clear near-term catalyst in a choppy market — a mild long lean.
key_factors: P/E diluted 25.6x sits at the low end of 1-year range (24.1-30.4x), offering a modestly better entry than recent history
Best-in-class fundamentals: ROE 24.6%, gross margin 89.3%, Q2 revenue +9% YoY ($80.33B vs $73.74B), EPS +25% YoY ($5.34 vs $4.26)
Price has pulled back ~7.9% from mid-August $548 high to $505, with 3M return flat and 1Y +28.7% — momentum is weak but quality is intact
News flow is neutral-to-positive (Nebraska Medicaid contract win on 2022-09-27) with no major negative catalysts

sources_cited.excerpt: pe_diluted=25.617 p_b=6.296 p_s=1.565 net_margin=0.061 roe=0.246 gross_margin=0.893 operating_margin=0.083
revenue=80.33B net_income=5.20B eps_diluted=5.34 gross_profit=71.74B operating_income=7.13B total_equity=76.20B
UnitedHealth (UNH) Wins New Medicaid Contract in Nebraska

CAT.rationale: CAT trades at a 1-year low PE of ~13x with elite ROE of 42.9% and growing earnings, offering attractive risk-adjusted reward despite an uncertain macro backdrop.
key_factors: PE diluted at 12.97x near 1-year low (range 12.8-26.0x), signaling valuation reset
ROE 42.9% and net margin 12.5% indicate high-quality earnings power despite macro headwinds
Q2 2022 revenue $14.25B and EPS $3.13 vs Q1 $13.59B/$2.86 show continued sequential growth
Price down 15.6% over past year to $164.08, compressing multiple from 26x to 13x
News flow mixed but includes bullish framing (top dividend, set to soar, defense beneficiary)

sources_cited.excerpt: Why Caterpillar (CAT) is a Top Dividend Stock for Your Portfolio
These 3 Dow Stocks Are Set to Soar in 2022's Second Half and Beyond

GS.rationale: Deep-value setup (6.5x P/E, 0.9x P/B, 13.7% ROE) with below-book pricing offers attractive risk-adjusted reward over a year, though decelerating earnings and a clear downtrend temper conviction.
key_factors: P/E diluted 6.53x and P/B 0.896x — trading below book with extremely cheap earnings multiple (1y P/E range 5.1-7.9x)
ROE 13.7% and net margin 31.7% — high-quality franchise economics supporting the value case
Q2 2022 EPS $7.73 vs Q1 2022 EPS $10.76 — sequential earnings deceleration of ~28% is the key risk
Price down 22.9% over 1 year with accelerating September decline (~$342 on 9/12 to $293.05 on 9/30)
Regulatory headwinds: SEC/CFTC fines ~$2B for record-keeping failures (9/27 news)

sources_cited.excerpt: Big banks to pay nearly $2 billion for 'widespread and longstanding failures' in keeping text-message records
Goldman Sachs raises $9.7 billion for M&A deals
